description: In this episode, Austin Federa hosts a discussion on stablecoins, focusing on USDC and Solana Pay, with guests Shiraz Share from Solana Labs and Jeremy Allaire from Circle. They explore the role of Circle in the USDC ecosystem, its applications in payments, and the growing importance of stablecoins in the digital economy.
topic_summary: The podcast covers the significance of stablecoins like USDC in digital payments and their integration into business operations. It discusses the diverse use cases of USDC, from personal payments to institutional trades, and the evolving landscape of digital currency.
